---
title: "Figure 3 — time-resolved calibration across the 5 macro algorithms"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Per-ALGORITHM TIME-RESOLVED calibration. Reads the 5 ensemble CSVs
figures/data/figure_3_time_dlik_{NR,R,NMR,MR,IR}.csv (each ~300 MB, 300 sims, cell
N_ch=100, Current_Noise=1e-4 [matches Fig 2], interval=0.1) ONCE each; each file is fread + FILTERED to the
r_std/y_mean/y_var primitive rows, the timing rows, AND the per-step score for one
representative parameter (k_off), then discarded. r_std = (patch_current - y_mean)/sqrt(y_var).

Algorithms grouped non-recursive (NR, NMR) | recursive (R, MR, IR). Panels A,B share one
scale across all 5; C,D,E use a common scale PER GROUP (the recursive trio would be crushed
on the non-recursive scale, and a per-facet free scale would auto-zoom IR's ~0 ACF into noise).

  A: example trace y_mean +/- sqrt(y_var) over the observed current (one recording/algo).
  B: mean_t[r_std] ~ 0   (bias).
  C: mean_t[r_std^2] ~ 1  (variance / unrolled NIS).
  D: autocorrelation of r_std (observation residual) -> data-level whiteness.
  E: autocorrelation of the per-step score s_t = d logL_t/d k_off (gradient) -> the SAME
     temporal memory at the inference level. A non-white score IS F != J by definition, so E
     bridges to the correlation distortion / miscalibrated Fisher CIs. The score ACF is
     parameter-independent (k_off representative; the 4-parameter grid is figure_3_score_pub).
Significance for D,E = mean over recordings +/- 1.96 SE per lag (CI excludes 0 -> non-white).
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r read}
ALGOS  <- c("NR", "NMR", "R", "MR", "IR")   # non-recursive | recursive  (NMR = data-file key)
ALAB   <- c(NR = "NR", NMR = "MNR", R = "R", MR = "MR", IR = "IR")   # display label: show the NMR key as MNR
P_MAIN <- 1L   # k_off (param_index); the score ACF is parameter-independent (see supplement)

read_one <- function(a) {
  dt <- data.table::fread(sprintf("../data/figure_3_time_dlik_%s.csv", a),
                          skip = 1, showProgress = FALSE)
  v  <- tibble::as_tibble(dt[calculus == "primitive" &
                             component_path %chin% c("r_std","y_mean","y_var"),
                             .(simulation_index, sample_index, component_path, value)])
  ti <- tibble::as_tibble(dt[!is.na(patch_current),
                             .(simulation_index, sample_index, step_middle, patch_current, agonist)])
  sc <- tibble::as_tibble(dt[component_path == "logL" & calculus == "derivative" &
                             param_index == P_MAIN & !is.na(sample_index),
                             .(simulation_index, sample_index, value)])
  rm(dt); gc(verbose = FALSE)
  val <- v %>% group_by(simulation_index, sample_index, component_path) %>%
    summarise(value = first(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = component_path, values_from = value)
  tim <- ti %>% group_by(simulation_index, sample_index) %>%
    summarise(t = first(step_middle), obs = first(patch_current),
              agonist = first(agonist), .groups = "drop")
  resid <- inner_join(tim, val, by = c("simulation_index", "sample_index")) %>%
    filter(is.finite(r_std)) %>% mutate(algorithm = a)
  score <- sc %>% group_by(simulation_index, sample_index) %>%
    summarise(score = first(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(is.finite(score)) %>% mutate(algorithm = a)
  list(resid = resid, score = score)
}

raw <- map(ALGOS, read_one)
dd  <- map_dfr(raw, "resid") %>%
  mutate(algorithm = factor(algorithm, levels = ALGOS), t = t * 1000) %>%   # step_middle s -> ms
  arrange(algorithm, simulation_index, sample_index)
ss  <- map_dfr(raw, "score") %>%
  mutate(algorithm = factor(algorithm, levels = ALGOS)) %>%
  arrange(algorithm, simulation_index, sample_index)

n_samp <- n_distinct(dd$sample_index)
ag_on  <- dd %>% filter(agonist > 0) %>% summarise(t0 = min(t), t1 = max(t))
# full-panel agonist band. ymin branches: a log10 axis rejects a negative floor
# (log10(<=0)=NaN -> rect dropped); linear panels go negative and need to reach the floor.
mkshade <- function(logr = FALSE) {
  if (!(nrow(ag_on) && is.finite(ag_on$t0))) return(NULL)
  annotate("rect", xmin = ag_on$t0, xmax = ag_on$t1,
           ymin = if (logr) 1e-10 else -1e10, ymax = 1e10, fill = "grey85", alpha = .5)
}
```

```{r time-resolved}
ts <- dd %>% group_by(algorithm, sample_index) %>%
  summarise(t = first(t), n = n(),
            mean_r  = mean(r_std),   se_r  = sd(r_std) / sqrt(n),
            mean_r2 = mean(r_std^2), se_r2 = sd(r_std^2) / sqrt(n), .groups = "drop")
ex <- dd %>% group_by(algorithm) %>% filter(simulation_index == min(simulation_index)) %>% ungroup()
```

```{r autocorrelation}
LAGMAX  <- min(25, n_samp - 2)
acf_one <- function(x) as.numeric(acf(x, lag.max = LAGMAX, plot = FALSE)$acf)
mean_acf <- function(df, col) {
  df %>% group_by(algorithm, simulation_index) %>%
    summarise(a = list(acf_one(.data[[col]])), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(algorithm) %>% summarise(M = list(do.call(rbind, a)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(d = map(M, ~ tibble(lag = 0:LAGMAX, acf = colMeans(.x),
                               se = apply(.x, 2, sd) / sqrt(nrow(.x))))) %>%
    select(algorithm, d) %>% unnest(d) %>% filter(lag >= 1)
}
acf_r  <- mean_acf(dd, "r_std")
acf_sc <- mean_acf(ss, "score")
```

```{r panels, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 9.5}
COL <- "#0072B2"; NUL <- "#009E73"
naive <- c("NR", "NMR"); recg <- c("R", "MR", "IR")   # keys (NMR = data-file key, displayed as MNR)
FULL  <- c(NR = "Non-Recursive", NMR = "Mean Non-Recursive", R = "Recursive",
           MR = "Mean Recursive", IR = "Interval Recursive")

# per-group y-range (naive | recursive), padded — the two-block scale (as Figure 1's logL row): the
# recursive trio's ~0 bias would be crushed on the naive scale, so each block gets its own axis.
grange <- function(lo, hi, algo, pad = .08) {
  g <- tibble(lo, hi, grp = ifelse(algo %in% naive, 1L, 2L)) %>% group_by(grp) %>%
    summarise(lo = min(lo), hi = max(hi), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(pd = (hi - lo) * pad, lo = lo - pd, hi = hi + pd)
  list(naive = c(g$lo[g$grp == 1], g$hi[g$grp == 1]), rec = c(g$lo[g$grp == 2], g$hi[g$grp == 2]))
}
padr <- function(r, f = .06) r + c(-1, 1) * diff(r) * f

# nice ratio breaks within [lo, hi] (RATIO units), ALWAYS including 1; dense for narrow
# ranges, 1-2-5 once it spans >~1 decade. Used by the log10 (non-negative) rows.
ratio_breaks <- function(lo, hi) {
  cand <- if (log10(hi) - log10(lo) <= 1.2)
            c(.1, .2, .3, .5, .7, 1, 1.5, 2, 3, 5, 7, 10, 15, 20, 30, 50, 70, 100)
          else c(.1, .2, .5, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 500, 1000)
  b <- cand[cand >= lo & cand <= hi]
  sort(unique(c(1, b)))
}

# column-header strip cell (algorithms on top, ONCE); ALAB shows the NMR key as MNR
colhead <- function(k) ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(ALAB[[k]], subtitle = FULL[[k]]) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 9), plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 7))

# decorate a panel: y-NUMBERS only on NR (+ its quantity title) and, for the grouped rows, on R (the
# recursive block's leftmost); x-NUMBERS only on the bottom of each x-block (time under C, lag under E).
# logr = TRUE -> log10 y-axis for non-negative quantities (variance/ratios), reference 1 always on axis;
# linear rows force 0 into the ticks (the null of the bias/ACF rows).
deco <- function(p, col, split, xr, yl, yq, ttl = NULL, tag = NULL, bottom = FALSE, xlab = NULL, logr = FALSE) {
  ylim <- if (is.list(yl)) (if (col %in% naive) yl$naive else yl$rec) else yl
  if (logr) {
    ylim <- c(min(ylim[1], 1), max(ylim[2], 1))
    rb <- ratio_breaks(ylim[1], ylim[2])
    p <- p + scale_y_log10(breaks = rb, labels = as.character(rb)) + coord_cartesian(xlim = xr, ylim = ylim)
  } else {
    brk <- pretty(ylim); brk <- sort(unique(c(0, brk))); brk <- brk[brk >= ylim[1] & brk <= ylim[2]]
    p <- p + scale_y_continuous(breaks = brk) + coord_cartesian(xlim = xr, ylim = ylim)
  }
  if (col == "NR") p <- p + ylab(yq) + theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = 8))
  else if (col == "R" && split) p <- p + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank())            # numbers, no title
  else p <- p + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
  # x NUMBERS on every bottom-of-block panel, but the x TITLE only ONCE, on the centre column (R)
  if (bottom) {
    if (col == "R") p <- p + xlab(xlab) + theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 8))
    else p <- p + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())
  } else p <- p + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank())
  if (!is.null(tag)) p <- p + labs(tag = tag)
  if (!is.null(ttl)) p <- p + ggtitle(ttl) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 8.5, face = "plain", margin = margin(b = 1)))
  p + theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), plot.margin = margin(1.5, 3, 1.5, 3))
}
base <- function() theme_bw(base_size = 8)
tr <- range(ts$t); lr <- range(c(1, acf_r$lag))

# A — example trace y_mean +/- sqrt(y_var) over the observed current; SHARED scale across all 5
yA <- padr(range(c(ex$obs, ex$y_mean - sqrt(ex$y_var), ex$y_mean + sqrt(ex$y_var)), na.rm = TRUE))
pA <- lapply(ALGOS, function(a) {
  d <- filter(ex, algorithm == a)
  g <- ggplot(d, aes(t)) + mkshade() +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = y_mean - sqrt(y_var), ymax = y_mean + sqrt(y_var)), fill = COL, alpha = .3) +
    geom_point(aes(y = obs), colour = "grey45", size = .35, alpha = .5) +
    geom_line(aes(y = y_mean), colour = COL, linewidth = .4) + base()
  deco(g, a, FALSE, tr, yA, "current",
       ttl = if (a == "NR") "predicted & observed current" else NULL, tag = if (a == "NR") "A" else NULL)
})
# B — first moment of the standardized residual (bias), GROUPED
yB <- grange(ts$mean_r - 1.96*ts$se_r, ts$mean_r + 1.96*ts$se_r, ts$algorithm)
pB <- lapply(ALGOS, function(a) {
  d <- filter(ts, algorithm == a)
  g <- ggplot(d, aes(t, mean_r)) + mkshade() + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = NUL, linewidth = .4) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_r - 1.96*se_r, ymax = mean_r + 1.96*se_r), fill = COL, alpha = .25) +
    geom_line(colour = COL, linewidth = .4) + base()
  deco(g, a, TRUE, tr, yB, expression(bar(r)[std]),
       ttl = if (a == "NR") "residual bias" else NULL, tag = if (a == "NR") "B" else NULL)
})
# C — second moment (unrolled NIS): a variance (>= 0) -> log10, GROUPED, bottom of the TIME block.
# pmax guards the CI lower bound off 0 for the log axis (mean_r2 - 1.96 se can dip below 0).
loC <- pmax(ts$mean_r2 - 1.96*ts$se_r2, 1e-6)
yC  <- lapply(grange(log10(loC), log10(ts$mean_r2 + 1.96*ts$se_r2), ts$algorithm), function(r) 10^r)
pC <- lapply(ALGOS, function(a) {
  d <- filter(ts, algorithm == a)
  g <- ggplot(d, aes(t, mean_r2)) + mkshade(TRUE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, colour = NUL, linewidth = .4) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = pmax(mean_r2 - 1.96*se_r2, 1e-6), ymax = mean_r2 + 1.96*se_r2), fill = COL, alpha = .25) +
    geom_line(colour = COL, linewidth = .4) + base()
  deco(g, a, TRUE, tr, yC, expression(bar(r)[std]^2),
       ttl = if (a == "NR") "residual variance" else NULL, tag = if (a == "NR") "C" else NULL,
       bottom = TRUE, xlab = "time (ms)", logr = TRUE)
})
# D — autocorrelation of the residual (lag), GROUPED, no shade (x is lag, not time)
yD <- grange(acf_r$acf - 1.96*acf_r$se, acf_r$acf + 1.96*acf_r$se, acf_r$algorithm)
pD <- lapply(ALGOS, function(a) {
  d <- filter(acf_r, algorithm == a)
  g <- ggplot(d, aes(lag, acf)) + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = NUL, linewidth = .4) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = acf - 1.96*se, ymax = acf + 1.96*se), colour = COL, linewidth = .35) +
    geom_point(colour = COL, size = .25) + base()
  deco(g, a, TRUE, lr, yD, "ACF",
       ttl = if (a == "NR") "residual autocorrelation" else NULL, tag = if (a == "NR") "D" else NULL)
})
# E — autocorrelation of the per-step score (lag), GROUPED, bottom of the LAG block
yE <- grange(acf_sc$acf - 1.96*acf_sc$se, acf_sc$acf + 1.96*acf_sc$se, acf_sc$algorithm)
pE <- lapply(ALGOS, function(a) {
  d <- filter(acf_sc, algorithm == a)
  g <- ggplot(d, aes(lag, acf)) + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = NUL, linewidth = .4) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = acf - 1.96*se, ymax = acf + 1.96*se), colour = COL, linewidth = .35) +
    geom_point(colour = COL, size = .25) + base()
  deco(g, a, TRUE, lr, yE, "ACF",
       ttl = if (a == "NR") expression("score autocorrelation (" * k[off] * ")") else NULL,
       tag = if (a == "NR") "E" else NULL, bottom = TRUE, xlab = "lag")
})

# Figure-1-style flat grid: header strip row + 5 diagnostic rows, 5 algorithm columns
g3 <- wrap_plots(c(lapply(ALGOS, colhead), pA, pB, pC, pD, pE), ncol = 5,
                 heights = c(0.10, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1))
g3
ggsave("Figure_3.pdf", g3, width = 7.0, height = 9.5)
```

```{r summary-table}
dd %>% group_by(algorithm) %>%
  summarise(mean_r = round(mean(r_std), 3), mean_r2 = round(mean(r_std^2), 3), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(acf_r  %>% group_by(algorithm) %>%
              summarise(acf_resid_lag1 = round(acf[lag == 1], 3), .groups = "drop"), by = "algorithm") %>%
  left_join(acf_sc %>% group_by(algorithm) %>%
              summarise(acf_score_lag1 = round(acf[lag == 1], 3), .groups = "drop"), by = "algorithm")
```
